nasb.text: For their hearts are like an oven As they approach their plotting; Their anger smolders all night, In the morning it burns like a flaming fire.

esv.text: For with hearts like an oven they approach their intrigue; all night their anger smolders; in the morning it blazes like a flaming fire.

cnv.text: 他們陰謀埋伏的時候， 心中燒得熱如火爐。 他們整夜抑制怒氣， 一到早晨，卻像發出火燄的火燃燒起來。

ccb.text: 他们的心如烤炉，燃烧着阴谋。 他们的怒气如整夜闷烧的炉火， 早晨爆发出熊熊烈焰。
